mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.phone, u.password, u.status, u.created_time, u.updated_time, u.last_login_at, a.real_name as username, a.id_number as idNumber, a.gender FROM users u LEFT JOIN id_card_info a ON u.user_id = a.user_id ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT u.user_id, u.phone, u.password, u.status, u.created_time, u.updated_time, u.last_login_at, a.real_name as username, a.id_number as idNumber, a.gender FROM users u LEFT JOIN id_card_info a ON u.user_id = a.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
